html.zh: Transformer 用堆叠的自注意力和前馈模块替代循环序列建模。它最初用于机器翻译，后来成为 BERT、GPT 式语言模型、多模态基础模型以及许多现代 AI 系统背后的架构。
html.en: The Transformer replaced recurrent sequence modeling with stacked self-attention and feed-forward blocks. Introduced for machine translation, it became the architecture behind BERT, GPT-style language models, multimodal foundation models, and many modern AI systems.

html.zh: 每个令牌与其他令牌建立 query-key-value 注意力连接，从而实现并行序列建模。互动演示应突出自注意力如何替代循环式处理。
html.en: Every token builds query-key-value attention links to other tokens, allowing parallel sequence modeling. The demo should highlight how self-attention replaced recurrent processing.

html.zh: 专家通常把 Transformer 视为现代 AI 的定义性架构之一。它的长期影响在于可扩展的自注意力配方重塑了自然语言处理、视觉、语音、代码、智能体和基础模型研究。
html.en: Experts generally treat the Transformer as one of the defining architectures of modern AI. Its long-term legacy is the scalable self-attention recipe that reorganized natural language processing, vision, speech, code, agents, and foundation-model research.

displayDescription.en:
The 2017 Transformer replaced recurrent sequence processing with stacked multi-head self-attention and feed-forward blocks. Each token forms query, key, and value representations, allowing the model to weigh relationships across a sequence in parallel; positional encodings supply order information that recurrence previously carried. The original encoder-decoder system was designed for machine translation and achieved strong results with substantially more parallel training.

This architecture made attention a general computational primitive rather than an auxiliary component attached to an RNN. Its scalable blocks later supported BERT, GPT-style language models, vision transformers, multimodal systems, and many agent foundations. Experts generally regard the Transformer as a defining modern AI architecture, while recognizing that its standard attention mechanism can become expensive on very long sequences.
displayDescription.zh:
2017 年的 Transformer 用堆叠的多头自注意力和前馈模块替代循环序列处理。每个词元生成 query、key 和 value 表示，使模型能够并行衡量序列中不同位置的关系；位置编码则补充原本由循环结构携带的顺序信息。最初的编码器—解码器系统面向机器翻译，并通过更高的训练并行度取得强劲结果。

这一架构让注意力从附着在 RNN 上的辅助模块变成通用计算单元。可扩展的模块后来支撑 BERT、GPT 式语言模型、视觉 Transformer、多模态系统和许多智能体基础。专家通常把 Transformer 视为现代 AI 的定义性架构，同时也指出标准注意力处理超长序列时会带来较高计算开销。

quoteAttribution.en: Attention Is All You Need, Ashish Vaswani et al., NeurIPS, 2017
quoteAttribution.zh: 《Attention Is All You Need》, 阿希什·瓦斯瓦尼等，NeurIPS，2017

demo.en: Every token builds query-key-value attention links to other tokens, allowing parallel sequence modeling.
demo.zh: 每个令牌与其他令牌建立 query-key-value 注意力连接，从而实现并行序列建模。

text.en: Tokens exchange information through learned attention weights.
text.zh: 令牌通过学习到的注意力权重交换信息。

text.en: Sequence positions can be processed without recurrence.
text.zh: 序列位置无需循环即可处理。

text.en: Every token builds query-key-value attention links to other tokens, allowing parallel sequence modeling.
text.zh: 每个令牌与其他令牌建立 query-key-value 注意力连接，从而实现并行序列建模。
